---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for AIReady
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you're trying to solve.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case

Describe the specific use case or workflow this feature would enable.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- **Who benefits:** [e.g., Individual developers, teams, enterprises]
- **How often:** [e.g., Daily, weekly, per-project]
- **Pain level:** [e.g., Minor annoyance, workflow blocker]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
